data.title: 1inch: Fraud attack impersonating official email was discovered, reminding the community to be vigilant
data.description: 1inch officially announced that it has discovered some fraudulent email attacks impersonating the official 1inch. These phishing emails appear legitimate but contain malicious links or attachments that may endanger your security, and the community is reminded to be vigilant.

data.title: 1inch Warns Community of Phishing Email Threats
data.description: According to Odaily, 1inch has issued a warning about fraudulent emails impersonating the official 1inch communications. These phishing emails appear legitimate but contain malicious links or attachments that could compromise security. The community is advised to remain vigilant against such threats.

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net outflow of 1,818 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net outflow of 17,187 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, today 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net outflow of 1,818 BTC, of ​​which Fidelity had an outflow of 939 BTC. Fidelity currently holds 194,270 BTC, worth US$16.36 billion; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net outflow of 17,187 ETH, of which BlackRock had an outflow of 8,175 ETH. BlackRock currently holds 1,248,688 ETH, worth US$2.41 billion.

data.title: The 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid has made a profit of $674,000 on 863,000 LINK spot
BTC breaks through 85,000 USDT, up 4.32% in 24 hours
data.description: OKX market shows that BTC has broken through 85,000 USDT and is now at 85,026 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 4.32%. (This newsletter is generated with the assistance of AI)

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 85,000 USDT with a 4.31% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 14, 2025, 15:33 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 85,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 85,040.242188 USDT, with a narrowed 4.31% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Wall Street expects Bitcoin to rebound strongly in Q2 after weakness in March
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitcoin has had a bad start in 2025, especially as investors have entered risk-averse mode, but this may soon ease, with Wall Street expecting Bitcoin to rebound strongly in the second quarter of this year after weakening in March. (CNBC)

data.title: A whale is suspected of using the market fluctuations caused by the whale's 50x leverage trading operations on Hyperliquid to arbitrage
BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF Increases Holdings by $47.5 Million
data.description: According to Odaily, recent on-chain monitoring data disclosed by Bitcoin Magazine on the X platform reveals that BlackRock's Bitcoin Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF), IBIT, has increased its Bitcoin holdings by approximately $47.5 million. This acquisition, made 55 minutes ago, amounts to a total of 568.311 Bitcoins.

data.title: Bitcoin (BTC) Surpasses 84,000 USDT with a 2.45% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin (BTC) crossed the 84,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 84,037.851563 USDT, with a 2.45% increase in 24 hours.
